Workflow Builder Launched

AI powered smart workflow for fast teams

Mouse helps startups automate workflows manage projects and eliminate repetitive tasks with powerful ai driven systems built for growth.

Trusted by fast growing saas startups

Backed by

Combinator

Mouse helps startups automate workflows manage projects and eliminate repetitive tasks with powerful AI driven systems built for growth.

Mouse® Framer template is built for people who rely on templates to move fast instead of hiring a dev team or coding from scratch. It’s a ready-to-use system for traders, solo founders, agency owners, small teams, and service businesses who want to quickly launch landing pages, offers, and workflows while keeping everything organized and connected, without extra hassle.

Mouse® Framer template is built for people who rely on templates to move fast instead of hiring a dev team or coding from scratch. It’s a ready-to-use system for traders, solo founders, agency owners, small teams, and service businesses who want to quickly launch landing pages, offers, and workflows while keeping everything organized and connected, without extra hassle.

Mouse® Framer template is built for people who rely on templates to move fast instead of hiring a dev team or coding from scratch. It’s a ready-to-use system for traders, solo founders, agency owners, small teams, and service businesses who want to quickly launch landing pages, offers, and workflows while keeping everything organized and connected, without extra hassle.

Tanvir

CEO at Mouse®

How it works

Powerful AI workflows built exactly how you need

Mouse gives your team a single place to connect apps, automate tasks, and build multi-step workflows — from the first day you sign up to the day you scale.

Powerful AI workflows that run exactly when you need them

Describe what you want to automate and Mouse builds it instantly. No flowcharts, no engineers — just fast, reliable workflows that run without supervision every single day.

More tasks completed

AI handles tasks so teams focus on value

More apps connected

Real-time sync across every connected app

Always-on execution

Runs 24/7 even when your team is offline

Mouse brings every automation, agent, and integration into one dashboard. Build, monitor, and scale workflows without ever switching between different tools.

Smart AI workflow

Build multi-step automations that grow and adapt with your team daily.

Create AI agents fast with an easy drag-and-drop builder in minutes.

Watch every workflow live and fix issues before they impact results.

Team collaboration

Version control

Restore any workflow version instantly with just one simple click.

Custom logic builder

Add logic, loops, and branches to manage complex automation easily.

Works with tools you already use

Get premium automation tools that fully connected today

Mouse plugs into your stack in minutes. Connect your CRM, inbox, and project tools for a seamless end-to-end workflow without any friction.

Trigger workflows from emails and route every message to the right tool.

Connect any app instantly

Plug in 100+ apps and build cross-platform workflows without any code.

Manage connected accounts and monitor all active workflows in one place.

Smart team task routing

Auto-assign tasks to the right teammate based on role, workload or rules.

Sync events across tools and trigger workflows from any calendar action.

All your integrations, one hub

See every connected app in one place and manage all integrations easily.

Got questions? we have answers

Answers to questions about Mouse smart AI tool

Everything you need to know before getting started. Still have questions? Our support team replies within a few hours on every plan we offer to you.

What exactly is Mouse and how does it work?

Mouse is an AI-powered workflow automation platform. You connect your apps, describe what you want to automate, and Mouse builds and runs the workflow. It supports multi-step logic, conditional branching, and AI agents that operate around the clock without any code or technical setup.

Do I need coding skills to use Mouse at all?

None at all. Mouse is built for non-technical founders, marketers, and operators. The visual builder and natural language prompt interface means anyone can build complex automations in minutes. Most users create and launch their first workflow within 15 minutes of signing up.

How is Mouse different from Zapier?

Mouse combines workflow automation, AI agents, and a visual canvas in one platform. Unlike Zapier, Mouse understands context and suggests automations proactively. Unlike Make, Mouse is faster to build, easier to debug, and built specifically for solo founders and small teams at scale.

What apps does Mouse connect and integrate with?

Mouse connects with 100+ tools including Gmail, Slack, Notion, HubSpot, Google Sheets, Airtable, Stripe, Webflow, and more. All integrations are set up in one click. You can also connect any app with an API using our HTTP module, or extend through our Zapier bridge.

How many workflows can I run on the free trial?

During your 14-day free trial you get full Pro plan access with no restrictions. After the trial, choose a plan that fits your volume. The Starter plan includes 5,000 runs per month which is more than enough for most solo founders and small teams just getting started.

What kind of support does Mouse offer its users?

Starter users get community forum support with responses within 24 hours. Pro users receive priority email support with a 2–4 hour response window. Ultimate plan customers get a dedicated onboarding call, 24/7 live chat, and a named success manager who checks in monthly.

Didn't find your answer?

Contact us
